stories.title: U.S. Open 2026: The best shots, sights and sounds ...
stories.summary: Tracking all the top moments from the second round of the 2026 U.S. Open.

stories.title: Korea GK gaffe helps Mexico clinch 1st in Group A
stories.summary: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

stories.title: Canada, Marsch 'shaken' by gruesome Koné injury
stories.summary: Canada midfielder Ismaël Koné was stretchered off the field in the second half of the host nation's match against Qatar on Thursday at BC Place in Vancouver.

stories.title: Skubal: Tigers must rise before deadline 'or else'...
stories.summary: Tarik Skubal has made it clear as the Tigers continue to fall further out of contention as the clock ticks down to the trade deadline: "Play better baseball or else."

stories.title: Lawyer says Mickelson resigned from country club
stories.summary: A lawyer for Phil Mickelson says the six-time major winner resigned from a country club near San Diego where he was accused of inappropriate contact with a female employee.
